nasb.text: But nothing of theirs was missing, whether small or great, sons or daughters, spoil or anything that they had taken for themselves; David brought it all back.

esv.text: Nothing was missing, whether small or great, sons or daughters, spoil or anything that had been taken. David brought back all.

cnv.text: 無論大小，不分男女，無論是他們搶來的，或是被人擄去的，大衛都奪回來，沒有失落一樣。

ccb.text: 他尽数夺回了被掳去的男女老少和财物，
